purpose: small authoritative continuity record for runtime governance

current_task_state.active_goal: Recover and rebuild Gumbo dam/reservoir governance layer from RMPL spec and recovered runtime files.
current_task_state.source_rule: Preserve Gumbo namespace in source; translate only for external presentation.

verified_facts.fact: Recovered Gumbo runtime includes bridge, reflection_plus, dreamshake, journal adapter, memory adapter, memory loop, smoke beacon, and master state files.

decisions.decision: Do not replace Gumbo in source files. Gumbo is load-bearing namespace/provenance.
Break RMPL/dam behavior into rmpl_core.py, gumbo_action_guard.py, gumbo_reservoir_gate.py, and gumbo_dam.py.

open_loops.loop: Wire gumbo_dam.py into gumbo_bridge.py prompt flow.
Upgrade gumbo_memory_adapter.py into persistent reservoir-backed storage.

rejected_paths.reason: Potentially destructive, irreversible, external, or evidence-affecting action requires explicit confirmation.

handoff_notes.note: Dam layer is governance/control. Reservoir implementation remains separate.
